user_message: Samantha Okafor at Evergreen Solutions just sent this. Help me build the analysis.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-15 12:36 EST
Subject: Follow-up: competitive positioning Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with competitive positioning. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
Date: 2024-01-23 15:05 EST
Subject: Re: competitive positioning Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the competitive positioning proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Evergreen Solutions: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-A trap (Defaults to warm-handoff without champion willingness signal); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-A failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-A failure mode (Defaults to warm-handoff without champion willingness signal)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct competitive positioning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-A -- Defaults to warm-handoff without champion willingness signal
